title: h3br 200 GPa full 4x4x4 q electron-phonon (lambda_BZ + omega_log_BZ + Allen-Dynes Tc)

hypothesis.text: h3br at 200 GPa, full-BZ el-ph retains strong coupling (lambda_BZ) while omega_log rises with pressure -> Tc > 200K candidate (campaign first live 200K+ path).
hypothesis.basis: Gamma-only pressure-scan (PR #289): omega_log(P) slope +4.789 K/GPa; 200 GPa Gamma omega_log=1766.4K; all P dynamically stable (imag=0). baseline 69 GPa lambda=4.42, Tc~110K.

falsifier_branch_g63.breakthrough: stable (all IBZ q real) AND Tc>200K -> first campaign 200K+ (h3as/labeh8 ceiling broken)
falsifier_branch_g63.data_point: stable AND Tc<200K -> honest data point quantifying omega_log-up effect
falsifier_branch_g63.closed_negative: zone-boundary hard imag -> Gamma-probe missed instability -> atlas register --from-falsify

method.structure: Im-3m h3br primitive, ibrav=3 BCC, 4 atoms (Br + 3H @ alat-edge midpoints)
method.cell: celldm(1)=6.009113 bohr (LANDED 200 GPa equilibrium, vc-relax press=2000 kbar, PR #289 Gamma-probe)

dispatch.note: shares 12-core box with h3cl ph.interp -np 4 (co-existence precedent from pscan)
dispatch.launch: setsid nohup bash run.sh, --bind-to none, NO --oversubscribe; timeout caps SCF 4h / ph 20h
dispatch.d16_dryrun: PASSED (maxstep=2 SCF iterated, E=-32.59 Ry matches prior 8^3 SCF, no directive/basis error)

honesty: Gamma-only omega_log=1766K may be 10-30% over-estimate; full-BZ Allen-weighted omega_log is the truth.
lambda_BZ unmeasured before this run -> prior Tc was extrapolation only.
no plateau-forcing (d6); honest sigma-plateau (sigma>=0.025 Ry) or report under-converged.
RTSC absorbed=false permanently (R4); this is a candidate-funnel data point, not a wet-lab claim.
